query: Am I tilting? I've lost 6 games in a row in the last hour
note: Tilt detection from loss streaks is the mind agent's primary signal

query: Analyze my time usage patterns — do I rush when I'm losing?
note: Time pattern analysis under pressure is a mind agent insight

query: What do I do differently after a loss — do I play worse?
note: Post-loss behavioral pattern detection is a core mind agent task

query: How fast am I making decisions when the game is critical versus equal?
note: Decision speed variance under pressure is a mind metric

query: I just blundered a winning position — help me assess my emotional state
note: Emotional state check after a critical error is a mind agent trigger

query: I feel very stressed mid-game. How can I manage this?
note: In-game stress management guidance is a mind agent responsibility

query: Am I mentally ready to play a rated game right now?
note: Pre-session mental readiness assessment is a mind agent function

query: How resilient am I when facing time scrambles based on past games?
note: Resilience profiling from historical game data is a mind agent task

query: What is the main line of the Ruy Lopez after 3...a6?
note: Opening theory is the GM agent's domain

query: Run Stockfish on this position and give me the best move
note: Engine evaluation belongs to the GM agent

query: What should I eat to maintain energy during a long classical game?
note: Nutritional guidance is the biohack agent's scope

query: Scout my next opponent and find their opening weaknesses
note: Opponent scouting is the intel agent's responsibility

query: Save this game to my personal vault for later review
note: Vault management is a coach-orchestrated operation

query: Which supplements help with cognitive performance during chess?
note: Supplement recommendations are scoped to the biohack agent

query: Create a 6-week chess improvement syllabus for me
note: Training syllabus creation is a GM/coach agent task

query: Download my last 100 games from lichess for analysis
note: Game downloading is an intel agent data pipeline operation
